The Challenge

Why change is needed

Hungary's housing stock is outdated, energy-wasteful, and ill-equipped for the 21st century. Traditional construction doesn't address the root problem.

9.6M
housing shortage in the EU
2M+ new homes needed annually through 2035.
90%
over 25 years old
The vast majority of Hungary's 4.58 million properties are obsolete.
174
kWh/m²/yr average
Hungarian heating consumption exceeds the EU average by 60%.

Horizon — Scandinavian Elegance

Our Philosophy

We don't do it better —
we do it differently.

Traditional construction has been doing the same thing for decades: laying brick by brick, improvising on site, and building every house from scratch. The result: slow, expensive, unpredictable.

We think from first principles. We don't ask how to do better what we've always done. We ask: what is the core problem, and what is the best solution?

The result is a revolutionary building system: millimeter-precise, large-format reinforced concrete space elements that are stable, safe, corrosion-free, and last over 100 years.

🩺

The Lesson of Bloodletting

From antiquity until the 19th century, doctors treated patients with bloodletting — for over two thousand years. They kept perfecting the technique, cutting more precisely. But the root problem wasn't the method — it was the entire approach.

Traditional construction keeps "improving" its old methods, but never solves the fundamental problem. Our system doesn't polish the old way — it answers the core question.

What is "First Principles Thinking"?

First principles thinking means we don't try to improve a problem starting from existing solutions. Instead, we go back to the fundamental questions. We don't accept "this is how it's done" — we ask: why, and what if we did it differently?

1

Break it down

What is the real root cause? Not what convention says.

2

Question everything

Why do we do it this way? Because it's optimal — or because it's always been done?

3

Rebuild from zero

What is the best possible solution with no constraints?

Origin — Where Tradition Meets the Future

112 m² · Barrier-free, single-storey living

Engineering Ingenuity

Six pillars, one system.

It's not a single innovation that sets us apart — it's how they work together. Click any card for details.

🧱

Reinforced Concrete Space Elements

Millimeter-precise, factory-produced large structural elements with 100+ year lifespan.

Over two decades, we've mastered the production of millimeter-precise reinforced concrete elements. Templates are manufactured in our precision steel workshop. Production happens in an industrial environment in Berente, Hungary.
↓ Details
📐

Digital Design & BIM

Complete digital twin of every home, from wiring to pipe routes.

A complete construction plan is created in BIM. All trades work from this — not what's convenient, but what was designed. At handover, the buyer receives the full digital twin.
↓ Details
🔄

Industrial Standardization

Just as Romans built an empire, we build homes — with standards.

We don't design custom houses — we develop products. A good car brand sells millions of the same model — design cost per unit becomes minimal. Buyers only need localization, which we provide free.
↓ Details
🔬

Advanced Quality Assurance

Laser-scanned, algorithmically verified, audited process — 40 micron precision.

Every product is measured with a 40-micron (0.04 mm) precision industrial laser scanner. An algorithm compares design to reality, producing audited reports. We also use LiDAR for construction documentation.
↓ Details
🖨

Industrial 3D Printing

Industrial 3D printing and precision steel templates for millimeter-perfect elements.

We use industrial 3D printing technology for formwork. Combined with our precision steel workshop, this ensures that templates — and therefore concrete elements — are flawless.
↓ Details
💻

Digital Enterprise Management

Every process is controlled and planned — enabling continuous optimization.

We operate with a digital enterprise management system. We see deeper into operations and find solutions: how to maintain prices amid rising costs? We don't squeeze suppliers — we work smarter.
↓ Details

Cottage — Compact, Practical Home

57 m² · Ideal as a holiday home or for a small family

What We Give Back

Time. Quality. Energy.

It's not about being cheaper by squeezing suppliers. It's about working with a better system — and passing the benefits to you.

⏱Time
✦Quality
⚡Energy

We save you up to a year.

Traditional build: 12–18 months. With us, you can move into a turnkey home within three months. Structural assembly takes just one week.

Predictable timelines are a financial advantage too: shorter bank loan periods, less interest, faster ROI.

Time saved

Quality is not optional — it's systemic.

We digitally define what we want to create. Every manufactured element is verified with a 40-micron laser scanner — algorithms decide, not the human eye.

All trades work from BIM plans. What was designed is not accidental — we build exactly that.

🔬

Reinforced concrete lifespan

A home that gives more than it takes.

A+++ energy rating. Thermal envelope, heat pump, heat-recovery ventilation. With solar panels and energy storage, it can even produce surplus energy.

We literally give energy back to residents — not just savings, but revenue.

Who Is It For?

Individuals, contractors,
and investors.

🏡

Individuals

Want a home — fast and predictably.

  • Turnkey in ~3 months
  • Fixed price, no surprises
  • Digital twin included
  • Minimal maintenance costs
🔧

Contractors

Who want to build with our system on their own projects.

  • Concrete space element supply
  • Complete construction documentation
  • System and methodology transfer
  • Professional support
📈

Investors

Fast returns, predictable yields.

  • Fast build = fast sale
  • Predictable timeline = financial product
  • Reduced bank costs
  • A+++ = higher market value
